text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 301 

REDUCED_PREICL_CS 

LABEL: Indicates Whether Part D Plan Offers Reduced Pre-ICL Cost-sharing 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan offers reduced cost sharing applies to the pre-Initial Coverage 
Limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 
9 = Not Applicable 

COMMENT: This
